name: Box Tower
author: Poki
description: Box Tower is a puzzle game in which the player has to stack the blocks as precisely as possible to make the tower taller and beat his high score. Stop the block at the exact moment and try to avoid breaking the block into smaller pieces. Keep a good rhythm and create the tallest tower you can! How far can you get? How to play: Stop the block when it’s just above the previous one to stack them Stop the block and stack it - Spacebar About the creator: Box Tower was created by Codethislab.
